mapper.select: SELECT si.stock_code AS stockCode, MAX(info.name) AS stockName FROM stock_industry si LEFT JOIN stock_info info ON si.stock_code = info.stock_code AND info.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.industry_code = #{industryCode} AND si.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY si.stock_code ORDER BY si.stock_code

SELECT sc.stock_code AS stockCode, MAX(info.name) AS stockName FROM stock_concept sc LEFT JOIN stock_info info ON sc.stock_code = info.stock_code AND info.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sc.concept_code = #{conceptCode} AND sc.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sc.stock_code ORDER BY sc.stock_code
